_raw.missing_fields: Event name; Event date; Promotion; Weight class / bout class; Scheduled rounds; Confirmed fighter IDs / canonical matchup ID; Result-linking identifiers
_raw.source_targets: Repo matchup files; Repo fighter files; Existing prediction artifacts; Internal event/result ledgers
_raw.validation_rule: Fixture is complete only when: both fighters are unambiguously matched to the same bout; event/date/promotion are coherent; bout metadata is sufficient to regenerate the fight without fallback ambiguity; result-linking fields are present enough for later scoring.
